hooks.command: if command -v uv >/dev/null 2>&1; then uv run ./hooks/langfuse_hook.py; elif [ -x "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" ]; then "$HOME/.local/bin/uv" run ./hooks/langfuse_hook.py; else python3 ./hooks/langfuse_hook.py; fi
